research_method: er002_topic_adapter.make_topic_research_fn (OpenAI Responses API, model gpt-5.6-luna, web_search tool)

candidates.description: Argentina came from behind to beat England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal, reaching the final against Spain after scoring twice late in the match.
candidates.primary_source_note: FIFA's official match report/post-match coverage is a primary competition source.
candidates.two_point_split_note: 1) The dramatic sporting story: Argentina overturning a 1-0 deficit with two late goals. 2) The broader human/historical story: England's continuing difficulty in major tournaments and the emotionally charged Argentina-England rivalry.

candidates.description: Spain defeated France 2-0 in the other World Cup semifinal, reaching the final with a controlled performance against a star-studded French team led by Kylian Mbappe.
candidates.primary_source_note: FIFA's official match report provides primary-source tournament information.
candidates.two_point_split_note: 1) The tactical discussion: Spain's control and defensive organization against France's attacking stars. 2) The tournament storyline: Spain's return to the World Cup final.

candidates.description: Italy's Jannik Sinner defended his Wimbledon men's singles title by defeating Germany's Alexander Zverev in four sets, winning his fifth Grand Slam championship.
candidates.primary_source_note: The ATP Tour's official match report is primary-source information from the sport's governing tour.
candidates.two_point_split_note: 1) The match story: Sinner's recovery after losing the first set and his successful title defense. 2) The career story: what a fifth Grand Slam means for Sinner's rise.
